title: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?
innovation_summary: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act: We study this problem across web shopping, terminal environments, and question answering, evaluating 13 LLM-as-agent systems and 2 agent scaffolds on more than 28,000 tasks.
